GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<action>
FRENTE

<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO

GIRA_HORARIO

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO

I should turn to face up first to move into the safe open cell above me.

GIRA_HORARIO

GIRA_HORARIO
